user.title: Sourdough Monitor Setup
user.description: Choose your preferred unit system. All values are stored in grams internally and converted for display.

amounts.title: Feeding Amounts
amounts.description: Set the amounts for each feeding. The recipe default is ½ cup flour ({recipe_flour}) and ¼ cup water ({recipe_water}) per feeding.

data.vessel_tare_g: Empty vessel / jar weight (0 to skip)

error.flour_must_be_positive: Flour amount must be greater than 0.
error.water_must_be_positive: Water amount must be greater than 0.

data.vessel_tare_g: Empty vessel / jar weight (0 to skip)

error.flour_must_be_positive: Flour amount must be greater than 0.
error.water_must_be_positive: Water amount must be greater than 0.

reset_process.name: Reset Process
reset_process.description: Reset the sourdough process to Day 1.
